scope.description: Durable Phase 5 causal synthesis for the pickup rescue chapter. Documentation-only freeze; no new train, re-eval, final access, or Phase 6b.

verification.method: Recomputed SHA-256 of each listed path; compared headline metrics to AGENTS.md frozen facts.

raw_protocol_v2_final.note: Registered raw pure-MLP BC under legacy_progress_phase. Both action spaces fail proposed learned-policy gates.

best_fair_validation_family.name: H-EE-014 hybrid NN gripper + MLP arm A1 under global_gripper
best_fair_validation_family.why_selected: Strongest symmetric validation family applied identically to joint and EE; not because EE is deployment-ready.

mlp_global_gripper_baseline_for_context.source_note: H-EE-021 pure-MLP global_gripper comparison baseline embedded in h_ee_014_comparison.json

decisive_probes.claim: Raw observed EE transitions (labels) are a viable executable command-scale replacement for reconstructed policy_labels.

metrics.mean_arm_l2_raw_vs_policy_scale_note: raw observed arm L2 ~30x smaller than policy_labels (audit in comparison artifact)

ruled_out: Using raw observed EE transitions as drop-in executable training/command labels under the current record-and-replay contract.
not_ruled_out: That reconstructed policy_labels are optimal among all possible label constructions.
Alternative label reconstructions or different adapter definitions that remain executable.

decisive_probes.claim: Simple monotonic reduction of frozen hybrid EE arm action gain rescues missing-lift / constraint thrash without collapsing success.
ruled_out: Simple monotonic reduction of frozen EE arm gain as a rescue for the current hybrid A1 models.
Treating lower failure-conditioned constraint exposure alone as causal improvement when success is not recovered.
not_ruled_out: Controller integration as a broader moderator of action-space learnability (different controllers, tracking contracts, or non-gain interventions).
Non-monotonic or adaptive gain schedules as new registered hypotheses.

decisive_probes.claim: Structurally legal oracle gripper timing raises the frozen hybrid arm rollout ceiling on validation.
ruled_out: That structurally legal gripper timing is the primary remaining fix for the frozen hybrid A1 EE arm residual.
Crediting oracle early_close/reopen zeros as learned-policy gains.
not_ruled_out: Learned arm/path/force issues that co-evolve with gripper timing in true joint training.
That a different learned gripper policy could interact better with a re-trained arm.
interpretation_guards: Oracle diagnostic only — not learned-policy performance.
Not a literal arm upper bound because the oracle changes the closed-loop trajectory and caused paired regressions (+5/-20).
Does not replace the raw EE-vs-joint comparison ladder.

decisive_probes.claim: Hybrid NN gripper + MLP arm under global_gripper improves both action spaces on validation relative to pure-MLP global_gripper.
ruled_out: That reopen/hold after close is an unsolvable residual under the pure-MLP global_gripper family (hybrid eliminates reopens).
not_ruled_out: That EE is ready for final access or deployment.
That hybrid makes EE universally competitive with joint under all tasks/controllers.
decisive_probes.role_in_synthesis: Selected fair comparison contract because applied symmetrically and is the strongest validation family — not because EE is ready.

synthesis_conclusions.end_gripper_gain_rescue_tuning_reason: H-EE-007/002/015 close the mainline label-scale, gain-rescue, and oracle-gripper residual paths; residual program SP0–SP3 already rejected match-set and A2 arm-only. Default next work is comparative research program expansion, not more rescue knobs.
synthesis_conclusions.do_not_claim_ee_universally_worse_reason: Evidence is one simulator, one task family, one controller integration, and one BC family under a frozen contract. Gap is real and large under that contract; universality is not established.
synthesis_conclusions.selected_fair_contract_reason: Symmetric application + strongest validation family; freezes comparative work without authorizing final/Phase 6b.

frozen_next_program_contract.purpose: Primary contract for the next state-based comparative work (efficiency, pick-place, controller replication). Does not authorize final access, Phase 6b, or deployment readiness claims.

optional_mechanism_backlog.note: Impulse almost-wins diagnosed; SP3 train path only if softer close/approach is separately registered. Not mainline.
Short history / tiny GRU only if a non-Markov arm residual is carefully argued. Not mainline.
Impulse train path remains optional; do not promote as default next step.

ordered.name: Preregistered demonstration-count efficiency curve
ordered.description: Nested stratified demo subsets, common seeds, both action spaces under the frozen hybrid contract.

ordered.name: Learned pick-place BC replication
ordered.description: Second manipulation task for both action spaces under the frozen contract; scripted/replay plumbing already exists.

ordered.name: Controller-integration replication on SO-101
ordered.description: Compare Controller A (stateless current-measured-pose-plus-delta DLS; current learned EE rollout) vs Controller B (persistent-target-lag DLS using the same underlying DLS solver). This is controller-integration replication, not an independent IK algorithm. Require identical task specs, observation schema, evaluation trials, and gates; use controller-specific executable demos/labels with exact joint/EE demo parity within each controller; do not require byte-identical realized demonstrations across controllers.

explicitly_not_next: More gripper/gain/FSM/match/loss rescue tuning as default
Final holdout access without new human-approved frontier progress
Hardware or second robot as near-term default
